channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Krebs on Security, The Hacker News, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading

item.title: Red Hat npm packages compromised to steal developer credentials
item.description: More than 30 npm packages under Red Hat's '@redhat-cloud-services' namespace were compromised in a supply-chain attack that distributed a new variant of the Shai-Hulud credential-stealing malware, dub...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Spain arrests doxer leaking sensitive data of govt employees
item.description: The Spanish National Police has arrested an individual for leaking sensitive information related to members of various key state organizations, including the National Cybersecurity Institute (INCIBE)....
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Anthropic to Open Mythos AI to EU's ENISA
item.description: The European security agency's entry to Project Glasswing is the result of "strong bilateral cooperation" between the European Commission and Anthropic....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: Microsoft's Zero-Day Legal Threats Spark Backlash
item.description: After a disgruntled security researcher published several zero-day exploits in recent weeks, Microsoft seemingly indicated criminal charges were in order....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: Dashlane password manager users locked out by brute force attacks
item.description: Multiple Dashlane users have been locked out of their accounts following brute-force attacks that attempted logins from distant locations and unknown devices. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Miasma Supply Chain Attack Compromises Red Hat npm Packages with Credential-Stealing Worm
item.description: A new Mini Shai-Hulud supply chain attack campaign, codenamed Miasma, has compromised @redhat-cloud-services packages to steal credentials and secrets from developer machines and deliver a self-propag...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Hackers Used Meta’s AI Support Bot to Seize Instagram Accounts
item.description: The Instagram accounts for the Obama White House and the Chief Master Sergeant of the U.S. Space Force were briefly defaced with pro-Iranian images and messages over the weekend, after instructions be...
item.dc:creator: Krebs on Security

item.title: WordPress malware campaign hides payloads in Steam profiles
item.description: Nearly 2,000 WordPress websites were infected with malware that relies on Steam Community profile comments to hide command-and-control (C2) data. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Microsoft investigates Office Apps, Teams file access issues
item.description: Microsoft says an ongoing incident is preventing users of its Teams collaboration platform and Office for the web cloud-based productivity suite from opening files. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Patch Now: Another Palo Alto Auth Bypass Bug Under Active Exploit
item.description: Exploiting the PAN-OS GlobalProtect VPN vulnerability requires certain conditions, but adversaries have done so in two attack waves that started in mid-May....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: Race Against Time: Why Faster Vulnerability Alerts Matter
item.description: Attackers are exploiting vulnerabilities faster than many organizations can identify and patch them. SecAlerts explains why faster vulnerability alerts can help reduce exposure and improve response ti...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: ⚡ Weekly Recap: New Linux Flaw, PAN-OS Exploit, AI-Powered Attacks, OAuth Phishing and More
item.description:
Monday hit like a cron job with anger issues.
A busted auth path here, a repo-side faceplant there, some "patched-ish" thing already getting chewed on in the wild, and then the usual bonus round: poi...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Critical Windows Netlogon RCE flaw now exploited in attacks
item.description: The Centre for Cybersecurity Belgium (CCB), the country's national authority for cybersecurity, warned on Friday that threat actors are now exploiting a recently patched critical Windows Netlogon vuln...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Webinar tomorrow: From alert to resolution in network incident response
item.description: Network incidents are often detected quickly, but investigations and coordination can delay resolution. Join our webinar tomorrow to learn how automation and AI-assisted workflows can help IT teams ac...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: China-Aligned Groups Ramp Up Attacks: Dragon Weave Hits Czech Republic & Taiwan
item.description:
A new cyber espionage campaign codenamed Operation Dragon Weave has been observed targeting officials and citizens in the Czech Republic and Taiwan to deliver an AdaptixC2 agent.
According to Seqrite...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Microsoft fixes outage affecting MFA setup, MySignIn service
item.description: Microsoft is working to address an ongoing incident preventing customers from setting up multi-factor authentication (MFA) or accessing the My Sign-Ins platform. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: The Security Growth Platform: Why MSPs Are Moving Beyond vCISO Tools
item.description: Three years ago, the practical question for an MSP building a cybersecurity practice was which "vCISO platform" to buy. The term was good shorthand for the work at the time: assessments, advisory, rep...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Microsoft fixes KB5089549 Windows security update install issues
item.description: Microsoft has resolved a known issue causing installation failures and 0x800f0922 errors when deploying the May 2026 Windows 11 security update (KB5089549). [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: OpenAI Codex Authentication Tokens Stolen in codexui-android npm Supply Chain Attack
item.description:
Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of a new malicious supply chain campaign that's targeting developers using OpenAI Codex through a legitimate-looking remote web UI.
The tool, named co...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Critical WP Maps Pro Flaw Actively Exploited to Create Admin Accounts
item.description: Threat actors are attempting to actively exploit a critical security flaw impacting WP Maps Pro, a WordPress plugin that has had over 15,000 sales on the Envato Market, to create malicious administrat...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: WP Maps Pro bug exploited to create admin accounts on WordPress sites
item.description: Hackers are targeting WordPress websites running a vulnerable version of the WP Maps Pro plugin, which allows creating rogue administrator accounts without authentication. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Dutch Authorities Dismantle Botnet Linked to 17 Million Infected Devices
item.description:
Dutch authorities have announced the takedown of a botnet that enslaved millions of infected devices, including computers, tablets, smartphones, and IoT devices, to carry out malicious attacks.
The b...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Palo Alto GlobalProtect VPN auth bypass flaw now exploited in attacks
item.description: Palo Alto Networks is warning that hackers are now exploiting a PAN-OS GlobalProtect authentication bypass flaw, tracked as CVE-2026-0257, in attacks attempting to breach corporate networks. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: New CIFSwitch Linux flaw gives root on multiple distributions
item.description: A newly discovered local privilege escalation vulnerability dubbed 'CIFSwitch' in the Linux kernel could allow attackers to forge CIFS authentication key descriptions, abuse the kernel's key request m...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: PAN-OS GlobalProtect Authentication Bypass (CVE-2026-0257) Under Active Exploitation
item.description:
Palo Alto Networks has warned that a recently disclosed medium-severity security flaw impacting PAN-OS and Prisma Access has come under active exploitation in the wild.
The vulnerability, tracked as ...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Name That Toon: Mark of (Cybersecurity) Progress
item.description: As part of Dark Reading's 20th anniversary package, we asked readers for a cybersecurity-related caption that captures their thoughts about the industry's last two decades....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: ChatGPT share links abused to host fake outage pages to deliver malware
item.description: Threat actors are abusing ChatGPT's content-sharing feature to display fake OpenAI outage pages that direct users to download malware disguised as the ChatGPT desktop application. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: California AG sues 23andMe over 2023 breach exposing health data
item.description: California Attorney General Rob Bonta filed a lawsuit against 23andMe, now Chrome Holding Co., over the company's failure to protect sensitive customer genetic and personal information. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer
